name: handson-workshop
description: Author self-contained, auto-graded hands-on workshops for any technical topic. Interviews the user to tailor depth, explores the local system to make experiments reproducible, then generates WORKSHOP.md, a styled self-contained WORKSHOP.html, and a standalone auto-graded exam.html. Bundles a companion handson-diagrams skill (D2 / ASCII / Mermaid / Python charts).
